column.name: ref_account_id
column.Comment: 该笔流水资金关联方账户ID

column.name: business_type
column.Comment: 业务类型 （recharge_into）提现审核（withdrawals_out）下单（order_create）成交（order_turnover）成交手续费（order_turnover_poundage）撤单（order_cancel）注册奖励（bonus_register）提币冻结解冻（withdrawals）充人民币（recharge）提币手续费（withdrawals_poundage）兑换（cny_btcx_exchange）

column.name: type
column.Comment: 类型 alipay支付宝 cailpay财易付 bank银联

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态 0待审核 1审核通过 2拒绝 3提现成功

column.name: type
column.Comment: xnb人民币 default比特币系列

column.name: coin_type
column.Comment: btc比特币系列 eth以太坊 ethToken以太坊代币 etc以太坊经典

column.name: status
column.Comment: 状态 0待入账 1充值失败 2到账失败 3到账成功

column.name: running
column.Comment: 服务器是否允许 0正常 1停止

column.name: remark
column.Comment: 后台审核人员提币备注
